3.1.2. RT PPP Experimental Results and Analysis
The 95th percentile value of RT PPP positioning errors is used as an index to express
positioning accuracy. Figure 7 shows the positioning accuracy of GPS-only RT PPP for
CNES, PPP-B2b, and BDSBAS services over 6 days. It is possible to draw the conclusion
that CNES has a positioning accuracy be(cid:308)er than 17.5 cm, with a positioning accuracy of
10.8 cm, 2.8 cm, and 8.9 cm in the E, N, and U directions, correspondingly. For PPP-B2b,
the positioning accuracy is marginally worse than CNES, with
